title: Digital Marketing Services Agreement
subtitle: Terms & Conditions
description: Terms & Conditions for Nexora digital marketing services

sections.title: 1. Service Provider
sections.content: This service is provided by Ronit and Aditya (Digital Growth Partner), specializing in improving online presence, local visibility, and customer acquisition for local businesses through digital marketing strategies.

sections.title: 2. Scope of Services
items: Website or Landing Page Creation (if required)

sections.title: 3. Nature of Results
sections.content: We focus on increasing online visibility, inquiries, and customer reach. We do not guarantee fixed sales numbers or exact customer increase, as conversions depend on service quality, pricing, competition, and market demand. Results vary based on business niche and location.

sections.title: 4. Client Responsibilities
items: Provide accurate business information, images, and service details
Give required access to platforms (Google Business, Social Media, etc.)
Respond to customer inquiries and leads generated
Maintain quality service and customer experience
Provide timely approvals for content and campaigns

sections.title: 5. Payment Terms
sections.content: Pricing is customized based on business goals, competition, and service scope. Payments are to be made in advance (monthly or as mutually agreed).
sections.additionalContent: Once the work has started, payments are non-refundable due to the time, tools, and strategic effort involved. Any additional services outside the agreed scope will be charged separately.

sections.title: 6. Advertising Budget Policy
sections.content: Ad budget for Google Ads, Meta Ads, or any paid promotions is separate from service fees. The client will either pay the platform directly or provide the budget in advance for transparent ad management.

sections.title: 7. Service Duration & Termination
sections.content: Recommended minimum service duration is 1–3 months for visible and sustainable results. Either party may terminate the service with a prior notice of 7–15 days.

sections.title: 8. Ownership of Accounts & Assets
sections.content: All business accounts including Google Business Profile, Social Media Accounts, and Websites remain the property of the client. We only manage and optimize them during the service period.

sections.title: 9. Confidentiality Clause
sections.content: All business data, login credentials, and internal information shared by the client will be kept strictly confidential and will not be sold, shared, or disclosed to any third party without permission.

sections.title: 10. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: We are responsible for marketing strategy and digital visibility improvement only. We are not liable for business losses, sales fluctuations, customer behavior, platform algorithm changes, or external market factors.
